title.normal: Research and Doctoral Programmes for International

hero.description: Presidency University offers PhD programmes across multiple disciplines with strong research support, global collaboration, and advanced laboratory infrastructure.

about.title: Research at Presidency University
about.content: Presidency University is committed to building a globally connected research culture. The Research and Innovation Council oversees research quality and strategy across all disciplines, supporting scholars through publications, international conferences, patent filing, and industry-sponsored projects. Dedicated Centres of Excellence provide advanced laboratory environments for cutting-edge research.
about.note: International research scholars are supported with funding opportunities, PhD registration assistance, and global academic collaborations.

schools.name: Presidency School of Computer Science and Engineering
Presidency School of Liberal Arts and Sciences

researchSupport: Seed Grant Funding — financial support for early-stage research
Patent Filing Support — assistance with patent applications
Centres of Excellence — specialised research labs and facilities
Publications and Journals — support for academic publishing
International Collaboration — partnerships with global universities
FRRO Registration Guidance — support for international scholars
